heroOverlay.heading: ENTER THE VAULT
heroOverlay.subheading: The exclusive personal training gym in Shoreditch

seo.title: The Vault Gym, London's premier private personal training gym
seo.description: The Vault Gym - London's premier private gym in Shoreditch. Exclusive personal training facilities, state-of-the-art equipment, and private training rooms. Minutes from Liverpool Street, Old Street, and Moorgate stations.
